instrument: LLM causal adjudication over FAERS STRUCTURED fields (no free-text narrative in public data)
interpretation: moderate self-consistency (kappa 0.42-0.48); the two models disagree on the plausible-attribution RATE itself (14% vs 22%). This CONFIRMS the number is a soft, uncertainty-laden triage estimate, not a hard measurement. A dual-LLM kappa measures automation REPRODUCIBILITY, not accuracy against ground truth — and no accessible ground truth exists because public FAERS carries no narrative.
